title: Better ingots
description: Changes the appearance of minerals to a better one. (Inspired by ingots from Create mod).
body:
## Features:
changes the appearance of iron ingot:

![Iron Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33306cd562fd545710ab016e72d8b5dd8479f49_0.webp),

copper ingot:

![Copper Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44eaff04ce16c2d0d2a47966f22f5361b39f8c28.png),

gold ingot:

![Gold Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d93b5411fcede81559c815c44ad7da8ef8ea14e0.png),

netherite ingot:

![Netherite Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05fda7001c2ceb58aff6ce0ea5812f77adfb158b.png),

diamond:

![Diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5544249f8defeea363c357fc19300f1d20ffcee.png),

lapis lazuli:

![Lapis Lazuli](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/129371e9fecf1cc36351b9343f99b582569686ec.png),

coal:

![Coal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66831316735f2b74e9695f18a8c74720da41722.png),

and redstone:

![Redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7847ffc5d4aeb61a82e2266a4821a4af4f58007.png).
